Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Luke Tchang
Message:
feature: rinkeby governor for dev + incremental enroll for staging (#58)

* feature: add shibuya to dev

* hub and spoke with shibuya

* fix: add astar to env.example

* fix: replace kovan staging with rinkeby

* fix: use kovan instead of shibuya

* feature: add enroll script to staging

* test: fix hub/spoke vs n-to-n bridge checks

* fix/chore: iteration fix, added checks into staging and local

* check: spokes not registered in each other

* tentative: delete shibuya

* fix: rinkeby gnosis gov, astar WASTR

* split scripts

* switch recovery manager to deployer key

* test enroll script dev (#59)

* test enroll script dev

* fix: init sdk

* setup scripts for rinkeby + moonbase, then enroll kovan

* switch finishing step on environment

Co-authored-by: Daniil Naumetc <daniil.naumetc@gmail.com>

* feature: write gov output

* delete old dev & staging, deploy initial dev

* deploy initial staging

* major kludge: write incremental deploy configs

* add enroll scripts

* deploy new chain dev

* separate scripts: check chain

* add console logs

* deploy new chain staging

* ahhhh im enrolliiiiiing

* updated prod astar and staging rinkeby addreses in nomad-deploy

* adds fully enrolled staging configs without sdk updates

* update dev sdk

* update staging sdk domains

* delete governance output

* bump sdk

Co-authored-by: Daniil Naumetc <daniil.naumetc@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Anna Carroll <anna.s.carroll@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Anna Carroll <anna-carroll@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Conner Swann <2635475+yourbuddyconner@users.noreply.github.com>

Author: James Prestwich
Message:
Governance Txs in SDK + Local Environment Enrolling new chain (#17)

* lint: prettier

* feature: add Safe interaction to CoreContracts

* feature: add Governance BatchCall support in new library

* refactor: move call batch into sdk, use safe signer

* Await functionality for `CallBatch` (#21)

* feat: batch await functionality

* chore: naming

* feature: wait returns a receipt

Co-authored-by: James <james@prestwi.ch>

* lint: sdk

* Daniil/nomad govern increment (#43)

* feature: incremental enroll script, xappConnectionManager

* chore: staging

* fix/chore: requested changes, bug fix

* fix: deploy

* refactor: move type conversions into the SDK

* Daniil/nomad govern incremental test (#45)

* feat/fix: added net connection functionality for incremental deploy, adj LocEnv for latest developments, prettier

* deployNewChain and bridge

* cleaned

* fix: deployBridges -> deployBridgesComplete

* chore: cleaning

* feature: new hubNspoke deploys

* chore: clean after rebase

* fix: watcher case

* chore: bump, imports

* chore: prepare for sdk

* chore: get ready for the pr

* chore: removed readme

* chore: removing overrides

* chore: upd safe-ethers-adapters + cleaned: local deploy scripts and local-env

* rename twoLocals to local; make all local based on dev; delete moonbasealpha folder

* local env nits

* remove cross-connect

* moar nits

* fix: call setWatcherPermission

* add TODOs

* fix: made it great again

* chore: reorg stuff, making ready for merge

* fix: remove gnosis package

Co-authored-by: Daniil Naumetc <11177808+kekonen@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Daniil Naumetc <daniil.naumetc@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Anna Carroll <anna.s.carroll@gmail.com>
